Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel And For Mandatory Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Discovery ; Points And Authorities; Declaration; Request For Judicial Notice; Statement Of Request And Responses In Dispute In Support;
Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.

Defendants' Motion To Compel is granted. Plaintiff's failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied as the request is not accompanied by a declaration setting forth facts supporting the amount of any money sanction sought. [C.C.P. Section 2023.040]
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (612)
